blender_collections.note: low/high/alpha are child collections of the 'Baking' root. The actual collection names are 'low'/'high'/'alpha', not 'Baking/low'. Role classification is by COLLECTION MEMBERSHIP, not by object-name suffix.

on_disk_layout.base: the folder that contains the .blend file
on_disk_layout.asset: the .blend filename stem (cleaned) - NOT a per-object name

naming.texture_set_from_material: strip exactly one leading 'M_' from the Blender low material name (name[2:] when it startswith 'M_')

role_pairing_suffix.behavior: low<->high (baking) and low<->alpha (alpha detail) objects are paired by stripping a trailing role token and comparing the remaining base. The separator is optional and may be '_', '.', '-', a space, or nothing; an optional trailing number is allowed, so rock_high, rock_high_01 and rock_high1 all reduce to base 'rock'. A Blender '.001' duplicate suffix is stripped first. Matching is case-insensitive.
role_pairing_suffix.example: rock_low pairs with rock_high and rock_alpha
role_pairing_suffix.note: This suffix exists for PAIRING across roles, not for deciding which collection an object belongs to (that is collection membership).

json_ipc.atomic_write: each file is written to a '.<name>.tmp' sibling then os.replace()d into place

pending_request.location: %LOCALAPPDATA%/SubstanceTools/ (falls back to %TEMP%, then the user home)

painter_request.note: written to BOTH the texture dir and the low dir

status_values_in_use.SUCCESS: operation completed; Blender treats any value other than 'SUCCESS' as failure
status_values_in_use.ERROR: operation ran but did not succeed
status_values_in_use.FAILED: request could not be processed; marks the request so it is NOT retried forever

json_ipc.status_and_message_live_in: the export RESULT file (.substance_tools_export_result.json), written by the Painter plugin and read by Blender (result.get('status'), result.get('message'))

staleness_marker.behavior: Painter compares request_id (falling back to pipeline_hash) against the last one it processed (_last_polled_pipeline_hash) and skips a request it already handled. request_id is str(time.time_ns()).
staleness_marker.note: Stale-vs-current detection is ALREADY implemented via these markers - it is not a gap.

proposed_not_yet_implemented.note: Genuine gaps only. NOT written by the code today - do not assume present.

current_default.implemented_in: BlenderTools send2ue core/utilities.py sync_unreal_mesh_folder_path() (single hardcoded anchor)

unreal_path_mapping.risk: A single hardcoded anchor is fragile when a local subtree does not mirror the Unreal content path. This already broke the character/ subtree once.
unreal_path_mapping.target_direction: Support multiple mappings and/or a sidecar file next to the .blend, and fail loudly when no mapping matches instead of silently using a plausible-but-wrong path.

minimum_real_round_trip: Update Painter on an existing project
Confirm low reload without mesh-map bake for High-to-Low low-only edits
Confirm rebake for Low Poly as High low edits
Send to Unreal handoff through the Export collection
